bead.title: enforce metered exclusion in route eligibility
bead.description:
<context-digest>Specs amended under fizeau-f0a71a4c. Unpinned automatic routing is defined as no Harness, no Provider, and no exact Model. Pay-per-token candidates must be removed before scoring unless provider default inclusion and explicit metered opt-in both allow them. Pins bypass default inclusion/metered opt-in but not policy requirements such as no_remote.</context-digest>
Thread candidate-level billing through routing and enforce metered default-deny as an eligibility gate with typed trace evidence.
bead.acceptance: Routing candidates carry billing/payment kind at candidate level; unpinned default/smart/cheap route decisions reject pay-per-token candidates before scoring when metered opt-in is absent; explicit provider/model pins can select them; air-gapped plus metered remote pin fails policy requirement; route decision trace exposes a typed filter reason for metered exclusion or an existing default-exclusion reason that clearly distinguishes the gate

events.body: {"rationale":"","score":0,"suggested_fixes":null,"waivers_applied":null,"warning":"lint hook: dispatch-failure: ResolveRoute: policy \"air-gapped\" has no candidate satisfying local endpoint: 5 candidates rejected"}

governing.title: Feature Specification: FEAT-004 — Shared Model Catalog and Policy Routing
